headline: NVIDIA Extends On Premises AI Reach As Valuation Stays Above Fair Value
summary: Dell Technologies and NVIDIA (NasdaqGS:NVDA) launched Dell Deskside Agentic AI, available immediately. The solution lets enterprises run and manage agentic AI models from 30 billion to 1 trillion parameters locally on high-performance workstations. It extends the Dell AI Factory with NVIDIA across desktops and datacenter servers using NVIDIA OpenShell and NemoClaw. The platform focuses on data sovereignty, predictable costs, and secure scaling for multi-agent AI workflows. For investors...
